title: Fossil Group (FOSL) Tops Revenue Estimates, EPS Falls Short
description: Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL) is one of the High-Flying Penny Stocks to Buy. On March 11, Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL) reported its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings. The revenue for the quarter decreased 19.8% year-over-year to $280.5 million, but topped the consensus by $31.22 million. However, the EPS of -$0.15 fell short of the consensus by [...]
